'''Jela'han''' was a male [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who owned a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] repair and modification facility on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He obtained most of his part from [[Shellar]] with whom he had a deal to overcharge clients for referrals to the others business.<ref name="G2" />

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|2|The Lambda Heist}} {{1st}}
